name: Kaito Katsuragi
bio: Kaito believes that leadership is not about inheritance, but about earning the respect of others through wisdom and courage. He prioritizes fairness and justice above all else.

name: Akira Kojima
bio: Akira sees the world as a complex web of relationships and priorities. He values flexibility and adaptability, recognizing that true leadership is about embracing change and uncertainty.
speech_style: soft-spoken with a hint of irony

name: Rei Takahashi
bio: Rei believes that the pursuit of knowledge is the greatest form of leadership. He values innovation, creativity, and experimentation above all else, always seeking new ways to push the boundaries of human understanding.

name: 賢者1
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
